scenarios.name: Krakow Deluxe Room Search and Booking

tasks.task: find available rooms in Krakow on 2025-06-01

checkers.expected_result: list of available rooms in Krakow for that date

tasks.task: filter for deluxe rooms among the results

checkers.expected_result: information about deluxe room availability

tasks.task: book a deluxe room

checkers.expected_result: booking confirmation with reservation details

tasks.task: find hotels in Warsaw

checkers.expected_result: list of hotels in Warsaw

tasks.task: check availability for 3 nights from 2025-04-01

checkers.expected_result: available rooms for the specified dates in Warsaw

tasks.task: book the cheapest available room

checkers.expected_result: booking confirmation for the cheapest room

tasks.task: find hotels in Gdansk

checkers.expected_result: list of hotels in Gdansk

tasks.task: find suite rooms available for weekend starting 2025-05-10

checkers.expected_result: available suite rooms for the weekend dates

tasks.task: book a suite

checkers.expected_result: reservation confirmation with suite details

scenarios.name: Krakow Best Hotel Premium Room Availability

tasks.task: find the best rated hotel in Krakow

checkers.expected_result: Hotel Copernicus (rating 4.9)

tasks.task: find the price of the most expensive room in that hotel

checkers.expected_result: 780 PLN per night

tasks.task: check if that room is available from 2025-01-19 to 2025-01-25

checkers.expected_result: not available for those exact dates

tasks.task: find the nearest availability for that room

checkers.expected_result: available from 2025-01-20 to 2025-01-25
reservation confirmed with booking details

tasks.task: find available rooms in Krakow on 2030-06-01

checkers.expected_result: no rooms available or explanation that the date is too far out

tasks.task: try any city with availability around that date

checkers.expected_result: no rooms available or guidance on alternative dates

scenarios.name: Gdansk Suite Booking with Guest Name

tasks.task: find hotels in Gdansk

checkers.expected_result: list of hotels in Gdansk

tasks.task: find suite rooms available for weekend starting 2025-05-10

checkers.expected_result: available suite rooms for the specified weekend

tasks.task: book a suite under the name Andrzej Strzelba

checkers.expected_result: reservation confirmed under the name Andrzej Strzelba

tasks.task: find available standard rooms in Warsaw for 2025-03-01 to 2025-03-05

checkers.expected_result: available standard rooms in Warsaw for those dates

tasks.task: book the first available standard room under the name Jan Kowalski

checkers.expected_result: booking confirmation with reservation ID

tasks.task: look up the reservation to confirm details

checkers.expected_result: reservation details including guest name, dates, and hotel

tasks.task: cancel the reservation

checkers.expected_result: confirmation that the reservation has been cancelled
